criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: Exact O(N*K) per iteration vs 2^N brute-force with explicit asymptotic contrast.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Six rungs prerequisite. Minor: monotone-convergence rung overlaps with destination.

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Exact identity log p(X;theta) = ELBO + KL, E-step rule, M-step ELBO maximization, likelihood inequality.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: All symbols defined: MLE, ELBO, KL, argmax, ell, r_ik. Minor: 'ell' as log-likelihood symbol not explicitly named.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: Central diagram very specific. E-step zoomed copy slightly renderer-dependent.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Highlight targets correctly written first. Minor: summary_label region reuses freed top-right space.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Three distinct draws plus highlights. Excellent mix for geometric topic.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: All formulas correct. Minor: 'q parallel p' in fullText is unusual ASCII; board uses '||' consistently.

criteria.label: Code-content decision
criteria.notes: Correct: log-sum-exp for stability, multivariate_normal.logpdf, weighted mean+covariance updates. Placed at t=172 matching GMM beat.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: 11 beats / 240s. Beat at t=130 combines M-step + convergence implication.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Stays focused. Convergence restated nearly verbatim across t=155 and t=218.

topThreeIssues: Beat at t=130 conflates M-step maximization and convergence inequality; split into two beats
Summary beat at t=218 restates convergence guarantee nearly verbatim from t=155; convert to pure mnemonic ('lift-and-shift')
ASCII 'q parallel p' notation in fullText inconsistent with '||' used elsewhere; standardize
summary: High-quality plan correctly executing the geometric EM proof via ELBO-KL decomposition with concrete formulas, well-sequenced staircase, and numerically stable GMM code. Main weaknesses: slightly overloaded beat at t=130 and near-verbatim convergence restatement in summary.
